---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What are you trying to accomplish? Who benefits and how often does the
situation come up?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behaviour you would like. Mock-ups, screenshots from other
tools, or links to the relevant section of the Claude Code SDK docs are all
welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them. If a
workaround exists today, describe it.

## Additional context

Constraints, related issues, or anything else worth knowing — IDE version,
platform restrictions, MCP servers involved, etc.
